question: [File: 'File Name: grpc/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/grpc/service/TopicMessageServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: subscribeTopic()] Can an unprivileged external user open thousands of concurrent subscriptions so that during a network partition the doFinally(s -> subscriberCount.decrementAndGet()) is never invoked on hung reactive pipelines, causing subscriberCount to grow unboundedly and exhausting server-side thread/memory resources?
